calendar.matters:
ADDED TO UNCONTESTED CALENDAR FOR Amended Osc For Change Of Name
Off Calendar Mar-17-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day. JUdge: Ollie Marie-Victoire, Clerk: P. Dias, Reporter: Patricia Dowling. Petitioner, Amazing Grace Mohr was sworn and examined. The Court grants decree changing petitioner's name to Grace Polly Vincent. Decree signed in open court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Feb-25-2003 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: Addrianne Elizabeth Mohr in propria persona with her daughter Amazing Grace Mohr.
*The case came on regularly as scheduled for hearing today. The Court orders decree changing the petitioner's daughter's name off calendar. The father was identified, the father is known and he needs legal notice. Petitioner advised to file amended notice and serve known father of child. No need to republish. Commissioner Loretta M. Norris, Clerks: P. Dias/Dianne Boffi, Reporter: La Von Granger
